title: Pooling Deep Well Plates by Column
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol pools up to 5 plates by column to a final destination plate. 100ul of sample is taken from each column of each specified plate and dispensed into the final deep well plate on slot 11. Explanation of complex parameters below: * `Number of plates`: Specify the number of agar plates (1-5) to fill for this run. * `Number of columns in each plate`: Specify the number of columns (1-12) in each agar plate to fill. * `P300 Multi-Channel Pipette Mount`: Specify which mount (left or right) to host the P300 multi-channel pipette. ---
steps_raw: This protocol pools up to 5 plates by column to a final destination plate. 100ul of sample is taken from each column of each specified plate and dispensed into the final deep well plate on slot 11. Explanation of complex parameters below: * `Number of plates`: Specify the number of agar plates (1-5) to fill for this run. * `Number of columns in each plate`: Specify the number of columns (1-12) in each agar plate to fill. * `P300 Multi-Channel Pipette Mount`: Specify which mount (left or right) to host the P300 multi-channel pipette. ---
100ul of sample is taken from sample column 1 of plate 1 and dispensed into column 1 of the pool plate.
Steps 1-2 is repeated for all columns of plate 1.
Steps 1-3 are repeated for all plates that the user specifies.
